title.rendered: Stevie Rees and Wyatt Edmonson: Badlands

content.rendered:
I normally work on a pretty long lead time, but every once in a while I discover a cover that I just can’t bear to put at the back of the queue.

This is one of those times.

Stevie Rees labels his sound as “swampland country,” and that’s a pretty great way to describe his cover of “Badlands” with fellow singer-songwriter Wyatt Edmonson.

“Badlands” is the epitome of rock anthems. To re-arrange it as Cajun country is daring enough, but then performing it acoustically? That takes guts. And carrying the melody with a fiddle and mandolin–well, that’s just nuts.

But holy cow… Rees and Edmonson’s cover of “Badlands” doesn’t just rock–it gallops, and it’s easily an instant favorite among a sea of Springsteen covers.

Trust me and give this one a watch.

© July 1, 2020

excerpt.rendered: Hot off the presses: Stevie Rees and Wyatt Edmonson transform “Badlands” into an acoustic, Cajun-country fiddle/mandolin romp that rocks way harder than you’d ever expect.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Moa Holmsten: Badlands
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: A case of writer's block led a Swedish heavy metal/avant-garde artist to cover an unfamiliar American rock star, and the result was one of the best Springsteen covers ever.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Cover Me, Joe D’Urso and Stone Caravan: Badlands
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Joe D'Urso bravely rearranges Bruce's classic anthem.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Silent Bear: Badlands
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Singer-songwriter Silent Bear returns with a raw, blues-driven cover of Bruce Springsteen's rock anthem.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Cover Me, Mojo Nixon: Badlands
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Mojo Nixon's never-released cover of "Badlands" is fresh, fierce, and fascinating--it deserves to be heard.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Badlands
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Every fan knows it; every audience member is part of it: "Badlands" is Bruce's anthem of steadfast resistance, persistence, and faith in his audience. It's one of his very best songs.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Cover Me, Ani DiFranco: Used Cars
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: From the 2000 "Badlands" tribute album comes this haunting cover of "Used Cars" from Ani DiFranco.
